question: Based on the data labels in the chart, which of the following statements is correct?

options.A: Design has the highest value among all the categories.
options.B: Quality has a higher value than Design.
options.C: Quality and Price have similar values.
options.D: Delivery has a higher value than Other.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
